rules: Do not claim live freshness unless a live check was actually performed.
Older source traces can still support candidate discovery, but preflight should surface stale_warning.
If metadata age or registry payload version is unclear, use HOLD_STALE_METADATA with a refresh next action.
Freshness supports routing context; it does not verify provider claims or authorize tool execution.

sample_freshness.stale_warning: sample data is static and should be refreshed before external use
sample_freshness.refresh_next_action: refresh source traces or keep candidate in HOLD_STALE_METADATA before recommending external use
